TextENGNew: "Naaatsumi."
Whack.
A sudden impact on my shoulder brought me back to my senses. I turned around to find Chisato-chan and Tamako-chan had been standing behind me for who knows how long.
"Wh... what is it?@k@vS04/36/310100671. What's wrong?"
"That's what I wanna ask.@k@vS04/37/310300413. School's out already, you know?"
Chisato's puzzled statement brought my eyes back to my desk. ...My notebooks and textbooks were still strewn around it, as though I'd thought class was still ongoing.

In the end, I couldn't muster any enthusiasm for classes today. ...I think I heard the bell, but my memory was foggy. The three of us must have eaten lunch together during the break, but I couldn't remember what I ate or what we talked about at all.
"You looked like you were spacing out in class.@k@vS04/37/310300415. I seriously wondered if you were sleeping with your eyes open."
"...Only you are capable of such an advanced technique."
"What am I, a fish?!@k@vS04/37/310300417. I was kidding, obviously!"
"There's a time and place for every joke.@k@|@y@vS04/38/310400179. ...Anyway, Natsumi, are you all right?@k@vS04/38/310400180. Your face looks pale, you know?"
Looking concerned, Tamako-chan motioned me to hold still for a moment, then gently placed her hand on my forehead.
"It looks like you don't have a fever...@k@vS04/38/310400182. Chisato, can you call your car today?"
"Good idea, I'll give it a call right away.@k@vS04/37/310300419. Just a minute."
"I-It's ok~.@k@vS04/36/310100674. I'm totally fine, so..."

I tried to stop her, but Chisato shook her head with a friendly smile, then waved at me and ran out of the classroom. When I got up to follow her, Tamako-chan grabbed my shoulders and pushed me back into my seat.
"Just stay where you are, Natsumi.@k@vS04/38/310400184. This is an order from your class president.@k@vS04/38/310400185. All right?"
"You're blowing this out of proportion..."
I said that with a forced smile, but Tamako-chan just shook her head at me.
"I've seen it with my younger brothers. They insist they're fine even when they catch colds, and it just makes things worse for them, you know."
"Tamako-chan, we're supposed to be the same age..."
"Everyone gets treated the same way in times of ill health.@k@vS04/38/310400188. Wouldn't you agree?"
I silently shrugged my shoulders. ...I hated to admit it, but she was right.
...She sat down next to me, then looked across the classroom as if concerned about our surroundings.
Most of our other classmates must have gone home or left to do extracurricular activities. Very few remained in the classroom.
And those remaining students were chatting some distance away, unconcerned about what was happening over here. ...After verifying the coast was clear, Tamako whispered to me.
"...I heard from Chisato.@k@vS04/38/310400190. Saturday must have been rough."
I awkwardly hung my head.
I wanted to keep it a secret, so I never told either of them about what happened on Saturday. ...But now that I really thought about it, Chisato-chan's father ran that care and welfare center.
So it's not hard to imagine he got a report from the center and told his daughter last night.
"Why didn't you tell us?"
"...Sorry."

"No, I'm not blaming you.@k@vS04/38/310400193. But it seemed like you were really forcing yourself to play along with our conversations at lunch,@k@vS04/38/310400194. ...so I was wondering if you were all right, you see."
"Oh... You noticed."
I let out a slightly self-deprecating sigh. ...I tried my best, but it seems I couldn't fool my friends after all.
"How could I not?@k@vS04/38/310400196. We're supposed to be best friends, aren't we?@k@vS04/38/310400197. There's no way I wouldn't.@k@vS04/38/310400198. ...The same goes for Chisato."
While looking back at the classroom door Chisato-chan just left through, Tamako-chan continued.

"Despite how she behaves, she's really worried, you know?@k@vS04/38/310400200. She said she told you about the job there because she thought it wasn't the sort of place where you'd get caught up in strange incidents."
"...She did?"
"It seems she had no idea that a resident from Hinamizawa had moved into the center.@k@vS04/38/310400202. ...She's taking it pretty hard. "I did something awful to Natsumi," she said."

"This is you we're talking about, so maybe you didn't want to sound like you were complaining to Chisato,@k@vS04/38/310400204. ...but since we're best friends, she might have wanted you to just tell her..."
Best friends... huh.
I consider the both of them that too. ...But that's why I wanted them to truly understand why I didn't talk about it.
If... if I told them about it, what would they have said?
I'm sure they'd sympathize with me, saying things like "must have been rough" to comfort me.
...But, on the other hand, I'm sure they'd label people from Hinamizawa as nuts, mock them, and say all kinds of unpleasant slander about them without a second thought.

To be honest, I've never felt any pride in being from Hinamizawa and Okinomiya, or for being a member of one of the Three Families, so in that sense I wouldn't say I hold all that much love for my roots.
...But hearing amoral things about my hometown and my former acquaintances from the mouths of my best friends sounded very unpleasant.
...So how would they react if I told them I had relatives living in Hinamizawa?
It was no laughing matter. If I had confided in them, our relationship wouldn't be the same.
No matter how kind and reliable my best friends were, our relationship was founded on the notion that I was an ordinary girl without any connection to some strange place.
If they learned that I was from the same place as a person with some mental disorder, I think they would end up looking down on me the same way or treating me as another weirdo.
And... what would happen after they learned?

That's obvious. They'd probably tell Akira-kun, since they're childhood friends. After he finds out, would he still feel the same...? I can't imagine he would. Surely that's the case. It has to be...!

"But I must say, people from Hinamizawa sure are a bother, aren't they.@k@vS04/38/310400206. They're welcome to worship that strange folk religion of theirs, but they shouldn't impose on others with it."
After hearing that from Tamako-chan... I was convinced. Anyone related to Hinamizawa had to keep that connection a secret at all costs.
It's fun to be with Chisato-chan and Tamako-chan.
I'm glad to know that Akira-kun has feelings for me.
I'd finally found a smidge of happiness after a year of living in this town.
I didn't want to lose it. ...Or rather, I didn't want to let it get away.
"...Hey, Natsumi.@k@vS04/37/310300421. I seriously think you'd be better off just going straight home today."
"Sorry, I know I'm being selfish.@k@vS04/36/310100686. ...I'll be quick, ok?"
I clapped my hands together and apologized. Chisato-chan shrugged her shoulders in exasperation, then with a dull voice told the driver Yamashina-san "keep going."
...Chisato-chan didn't look the least bit thrilled with my request to stop by the care and welfare center before I headed home.
It hadn't been long since the incident on Saturday, and she was concerned about my health. ...But most of all, she probably didn't want me seeing old man Hatakeyama anymore.
"You don't have to go today, you know?@k@vS04/37/310300423. You'll be working during morning classes on Wednesday too, so you can just wait until then, right?"
Chisato-chan tried talking me down... but I wanted to go today, so I made an unreasonable request.
I didn't say it directly to old man Hatakeyama... but I said something horrible last Saturday.
I know I was under pressure from that detective, but when I said I was "not from Hinamizawa" it was like I'd rejected my bond with him... Even now, I regret it.
In the end... I hadn't managed to see him after that. But I imagine my words were terribly shocking.
Then perhaps his sudden fever wasn't caused by the detective's interrogation, but my poorly chosen words...?
"That man will be fine even if you don't check up on him.@k@vS04/37/310300425. It's not like you're the only one taking care of him, you know?"
"Oh, wait.@k@vS04/37/310300427. ...Sorry, I didn't mean it like that."
"No, it's ok.@k@vS04/36/310100689. ...Even I know I'm just doing this for my own satisfaction."
"Natsumi..."
Chisato-chan anxiously pursed her lip and turned toward me. Her eyes darted back and forth as though she were carefully considering her words, but then she finally broke her silence.
"...Hey, Natsumi."
"What is it?"
"You know,@k@vS04/37/310300431. ...you can quit if you want."
When her tone dropped, I instinctively turned my body. ...This may have been the first time Chisato-chan stared at my face with such concern.

"I'll be honest here,@k@vS04/37/310300433. ...and you can get mad at me for it.@k@vS04/37/310300434. You're pretty shy when it comes to strangers, aren't you Natsumi?@k@vS04/37/310300435. Plus, it's like you're not fully accustomed to the city yet... so you're not exactly street smart."
"So when you told me you wanted a part-time job, I introduced you to the center because I figured you'd be absolutely safe there."
"I think... You're exaggerating there."
I shrugged and smiled bitterly. But Chisato-chan didn't tease me like usual.

"You know how happy-go-lucky I can be. Even I can't believe myself sometimes.@k@vS04/37/310300438. I like to believe I can survive in any kind of job, and that I can laugh off any humiliation I face.@k@vS04/37/310300439. ...But you're different."

"You're so kind, so pure... plus you have a sense of responsibility.@k@vS04/37/310300441. So I wanted to give you a job where people wouldn't nitpick you over every little thing and wouldn't leave you with an unpleasant experience... But look how that went."
"I'm really sorry about all this.@k@vS04/37/310300443. It's all my fault you've been feeling depressed.@k@vS04/37/310300444. So even if you think less of me for all this, I really won't object, ok?"
"Chisato-chan..."
...Chisato-chan's kindness filled me with warmth.
But at the same time... it was painful.
For I fear if she ever learns the truth about me... all this compassion will go up in smoke...
That's right... this is my punishment.
My punishment for protecting my happiness... And for upholding a lie for so long.
"...I'm okay,@k@vS04/36/310100696. really.@k@vS04/36/310100697. So you don't need to worry."
"Natsumi..."

"I'm truly grateful that you introduced me to this job.@k@vS04/36/310100699. Maybe I should say... I was destined for this?@k@vS04/36/310100700. Maybe that sounds rather arrogant, but the job's fun and rewarding, don't you think?"
...Yes, I'm nurturing my lie even now, but my feelings here are completely genuine.

"If possible... I'd like to keep coming here.@k@vS04/36/310100702. Even after I've made the money I need, I want to continue working here as long as you're ok with it.@k@vS04/36/310100703. ...Would that be wrong?"
Chisato-chan stared intently at me for a while... and then she let out an exhausted sigh.
Just then, she muttered "This girl, I swear..." in exasperation, then her usual cheer returned to her face before she suddenly grabbed me by the head.
"Mrrrph?!@k@vS04/36/310100705. Ch-Chisato-chan?"
"Ahahaha!@k@vS04/37/310300448. If you're that desperate, then Chi-chan has no choice but to agree!@k@vS04/37/310300449. ...Don't you worry about a thing. I'll make sure to gather your ashes, ok~?"
"W-wait, I don't want to die yet~.@k@vS04/36/310100707. Kyaaah?!"
And so the cramped car was filled with the sounds of Chisato-chan and screaming and laughing at the top of our lungs...
"Geez, you've bested me..."
"Huh?"
"Nothing, just me talking to myself."

Eventually, the car drove past the urban area and onto the prefectural road where I could see Saeki Hospital. The traffic light right before the hospital entrance turned red and we slowly stopped in front of the pedestrian crossing.
"The light here always turns red.@k@vS04/37/310300453. The timing sucks. Feels like someone's idea of a prank."
"...Are you sure it's not just once in a while?"

"No way!@k@vS04/37/310300455. As far as I can remember, the light has never been green any of the times I've gone to the hospital.@k@vS04/37/310300456. I'm sure the guy who designed these traffic lights is a sadist!"
"Or they hold a grudge against Saeki Hospital!"
"Y-you're overthinking this..."
I tried to gently let Chisato down as she emphatically thrust her fist into the air and pontificated. Just then, Yamashima-san suddenly chimed in from the driver's seat.
"...For a lady like you, I can't imagine what would happen to someone with a grudge against your husband."
"Hold on, Yamashina-san!@k@vS04/37/310300459. Just what do you mean by that?!"
"Ahahahahah!!"
After hearing such a flippant remark from mild-mannered Yamashina-san, I had to hold my stomach to contain the laughter. Chisato-chan looked at me for a while, then burst into laughter.
"Ahahaha!@k@vS04/36/310100713. ...Oh, what's that?"
Just then, I faintly heard a police siren coming from behind us.
"...What do you think happened?"
"I have no idea..."
But I realized that it couldn't be related to us because Yamashina-san had been driving responsibly the whole time, so Chisato-chan and I watched the police car drive past us along the traffic lane.
However.
Through the windshield, I saw two police cars crossing the intersection. And then.
They immediately turned left... through the Saeki Hospital entrance gate...!!
After they entered the hospital grounds, the police cars circled around the back... and stopped in front of the care and welfare center.
...And those weren't the only two here.
Another three police cars were already there, making for five cars in total parked with their red lights flashing. Encircling them were many police officers and hospital staff...!
"W-what's happening?!"

Chisato-chan and I tried asking some of the nearby onlookers after getting out of the car. However, most of them seemed to have been drawn by the noise, so they simply shook their heads looking just as clueless as us.
"What happened here?@k@vS04/36/310100717. What's going on...?"
"Please stay back, it's dangerous!@k@vS04/00/VT1B_takaya1002. Please, only staff are permitted to enter!"
I tried pressing my luck with a nearby policeman, but he spread his hands and prevented me from going any closer.
...All I could see behind him was yellow tape blocking the entrance with the words "Do not enter" written over and over again across them.
This isn't normal...! This is completely abnormal...!!
I surveyed the area, and was surprised to see a woman in a red suit standing amidst some police officers in uniform.
She was talking to what appeared to be people associated with the police on-site as she apparently gave them orders.
"That woman...!"
"Natsumi?!"
I rushed over to that woman with the momentum of a bullet in flight. And once their conversation began to settle down, I seized the opportunity to pull on her sleeve and call out to her.
"Minai-san!@k@vS04/36/310100722. Detective Minai-san!!"
"Hm?!@k@vS04/28/310500193. You are... Natsumi-san?"
Detective Minai gave me a surprised look. Prepared for her to scold me for interrupting her work, I hastily voiced the question on my mind.
"W-what happened here?@k@vS04/36/310100724. Please, tell me!"
As expected, Detective Minai stepped back like she'd been overpowered, yet her eyes turned slightly away with a troubled look on her face.
Nevertheless, I was undeterred, and when I began to move around to the other side... I suddenly heard a sob and turned around.

It was one of the caregivers. I didn't know her name because we were never very close, but we occasionally had shifts together. At the very least, I knew her well enough to say hi to her when I recognized her face.
"What's going on here?@k@vS04/36/310100726. What happened?!"
"Yamase-san was... Yamase-san was...@k@vS04/00/VT1B_kaigoFb1003. Uuuuuuuughh!!"
I was rendered speechless with shock that left my knees weak. Then, from the police car right next to me.
I could hear... a barely comprehensible voice mixed with static.

"This is Kakiuchi Police Station, calling all units.@k@vS04/00/VT1B_centP1002. This is Kakiuchi PS, calling all units currently on patrol.@k@vS04/00/VT1B_centP1003. A murder has been reported.@k@vS04/00/VT1B_centP1004. I repeat, a murder has occurred at the Saeki Care and Welfare Center located at Saeki Hospital."
"The victim is Kazuko Yamase.@k@vS04/00/VT1B_centP1006. Nearby units, please head in for emergency backup.@k@vS04/00/VT1B_centP1007. I repeat..."
I couldn't believe what I'd heard.
As I stood there rooted like a soulless doll, Detective Minai passed by me and approached that police car. She picked up the receiver from inside and held it to her mouth.

"This is the Minai car, calling Kakiuchi Police Station.@k@vS04/28/310500196. This is first division assistant director Minai. I have arrived on-scene.@k@vS04/28/310500197. Including the support here, a total of five units are assembled.@k@vS04/28/310500198. We need three more units at Saeki Hospital site for crowd control."
"Be advised that no pursuit of the perpetrator will be necessary.@k@vS04/28/310500200. The suspect is..."
...For a moment, Detective Minai glanced back at me. And then,

"The suspect, Kazuma Hatakeyama,@k@vS04/28/310500202. ...has been found dead in a room inside the center as of 1:51 PM.@k@vS04/28/310500203. The cause of death is severe blood loss.@k@vS04/28/310500204. Details will be announced later.@k@vS04/28/310500205. Over."
"Officer Minai, this is Kakiuchi Police Station.@k@vS04/00/VT1B_centP1009. Understood.@k@vS04/00/VT1B_centP1010. Please continue your investigation.@k@vS04/00/VT1B_centP1011. Over."
"Roger.@k@vS04/28/310500207. Over and out."
What did Detective Minai... just say...?
The person... who murdered Yamase-san is... is... is...?!
"......D-detective..."

I staggered toward Detective Minai... feeling as if I were wandering through a dream. The detective finished returning the receiver to the car, then slowly turned around as though she'd sensed my presence.
"......What on earth... what is this...?"
"...It is as you heard.@k@vS04/28/310500209. A murder occurred this morning.@k@vS04/28/310500210. ...One caregiver at this care center... passed away."
Detective Minai spoke in a clerical tone, as though trying to keep her emotions in check as much as possible.
That can't be.
I don't believe it.
Because Yamase-san and old man Hatakeyama... were both alive just two days ago, right?
The old man wasn't feeling very well back then... but the doctor said it wasn't a big deal, right?
And Yamase-san smiled and told me "good job" just before I went home, right?
"...I'd be happy if a girl as kind and compassionate as you could become a caregiver."
"Please work hard and consider getting certified.@k@vS04/00/VT1B_yamase1069. I will do everything I can to support you."
"Na... Natsumi?!"
I slumped right where I stood, as though all strength had been drained from my limbs... no, my whole body.
I felt two arms wrap around me and embrace me for dear life... It must have been Chisato-chan.
I heard something.
Someone was shouting in my ear.
But... I couldn't understand any of it.
Everything before me was spinning... Shapes, colors, everything collapsed and melted into a gentle haze...
"...Attention, coming through!@k@vS04/00/VT1B_qqMa1002. Make way, please!"
"We are carrying out the victim!@k@vS04/00/VT1B_qqMb1002. Everyone, move! Out of the way!!"
A harsh voice rang out.
The wall of noisy people parted, and two paramedics exited the hospital, carrying out a stretcher covered with a white cloth.
The victim...?
When I heard that, I shook off the two arms wrapped around me from behind, and I ran toward the stretcher.
"Natsumi?!"
"Please wait, Natsumi-san!!"
That's right.
This has all got to be some kind of huge misunderstanding.
Yamase-san can't be dead... That's impossible.
"Fujita-kun!@k@vS04/28/310500213. Restrain that girl!"
Whatever is on that stretcher, it's not Yamase-san.
It must be someone else with the same last name.
"Hey! You!!"
That's why I don't believe it.
I'll see Yamase-san again on Wednesday.
She'll tell me "do your best" and "good work."
With her usual smile, in that kind voice......
"Stop it!@k@vS04/28/310500215. You mustn't look... Don't look!!@k@vS04/28/310500216. Natsumi-san!!"
".........Noooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooo!!!"
It can't be...
It can't be...
This can't be. This can't be Yamase-san...
Because... Yamase-san is very beautiful.
She has smooth, soft white skin.
"Aaaaaaaaaahhh!! Hiiyaaaaahh!! Ugyaaaaaaahh!!!"
"Natsumi! Natsumiii!!"
"Please calm down!!@k@vS04/28/310500218. Calm down!! ...Guh?!"
"You there! Get away!!@k@vS04/00/VT1B_qqMb1004. Get her out of here immediately!!"
"Nooooooooooooooooooo!! Gyaaaaaaahh!! Hyaaaagaaaaaahh!!!"
She... she... she didn't have this split pomegranate for a face!!
"Calm down! Get a hold of yourself, Natsumiii!!@k@vS04/37/310300469. Please, pleeeease!!"
"...Fujitaaa!@k@vS04/28/310500220. I'll take responsibility, do iiit!!"
"Y-yes! I-I'm sorry!!"
I suddenly felt a heavy pressure on my neck. My breathing ceased and my vision went dark.
That's right... this had to be a dream.
Someone, please tell me it is.
